tweets.text: Public Historian Alison Mann highlights the #JazzDiplomacy exhibit at the @DiplomacyCenter during #TheReadout with @statedeptspox. https://t.co/pcQtQ0FU22

Acting Director Olive Sampson on #TheReadout with @statedeptspox: The @DiplomacyCenter is a museum and an education center. We want this to be a center where the American public has the opportunity to learn how diplomacy affects their lives every day. https://t.co/i24xU7JnlS

On March 2, Deputy Secretary John Sullivan & @UnderSecPD Steven Goldstein will welcome the gold medal-winning 2018 U.S. Olympic Women’s Ice Hockey Team to the @StateDept & recognize their efforts to empower women and girls around the world through sports. https://t.co/4ufgEgSmnP

.@statedeptspox: As Americans pay tribute to Rev. Billy Graham, we remember his life and legacy, offering hope and faith to millions. Our prayers are with his family and all those who worked closely with him in his lifelong ministry. https://t.co/mVy3minRe6

.@StateDeptCT Ambassador Sales: As the military phase of this struggle in #Syria and #Iraq winds down, we’ll be standing up and reinforcing our civilian and law enforcement capabilities to defeat ISIS in an enduring way. https://t.co/OSqbg7hJJv

.@USAIDMarkGreen will deliver remarks about U.S. Government efforts to advance energy generation and connection in Africa through private enterprise partnerships via @PowerAfricaUS at the 4th Annual Powering Africa Summit on March 1. https://t.co/JLrXopJ42S cc @USAID

As a mark of respect for the memory of Reverend Billy Graham, that on the day of his interment, @POTUS directs the flag of the United States be flown at half staff at the @WhiteHouse, U.S. embassies and consular offices, and public buildings and grounds. https://t.co/Ey2HVzAnya

Amb. Sales: As ISIS adapts, the struggle in most places will move from military to law enforcement solutions. Increasingly, we’ll need to supplement our military efforts to defeat ISIS with civilian measures that can ensure the group’s enduring defeat. https://t.co/ObUR2pOdUO https://t.co/kNWMUdXHvb
Statement by @statedeptspox on the death of Chinese #humanrights attorney Dr. Li Baiguang. https://t.co/Tz5xNaMGAz

Amb. Sales: As ISIS becomes more dispersed, our priority must be to stop it from reconstituting itself as a fighting force w/ a physical safe haven & keep it from using the internet as a virtual safe haven from which to radicalize or recruit new followers. https://t.co/ObUR2pOdUO https://t.co/dCmZ6s3l5R
